message:
feat(indexer): extend FTS maintenance logging with elapsed timing and row count diagnostics

Adds tracing spans with elapsed_ms and row counts to each FTS consistency
repair outcome (AlreadyHealthy, IncrementalCatchUp, Rebuilt) so maintenance
runs produce actionable performance data in structured logs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
